chunks.title: Hananiah's Prophecy of Peace
chunks.reason: Hananiah delivers a complete oracle predicting the end of Babylonian rule and the return of exiles.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Response and Symbolic Act
chunks.reason: Jeremiah engages Hananiah in dialogue and witnesses the breaking of the wooden yoke.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Counter-Oracle and Fulfillment
chunks.reason: God gives Jeremiah a new message of judgment which is fulfilled by Hananiah's death.
